definitions: An artificial intelligence-powered conversational agent developed by BMO (Bank of Montreal) to assist customers with banking inquiries and services.
A virtual assistant integrated into BMO's digital platforms, designed to provide information, answer questions, and guide users through various banking tasks.
examples: I used the BMO Chatbot to find out my account balance.
The BMO Chatbot can help you locate the nearest branch.
Customers can get quick answers from the BMO Chatbot.
